cross_scene_arcs.title: From Observer to Emotional Participant
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe transitions from a detached, mission-focused agent to someone deeply emotionally invested in the Princess, driven by recognition, infatuation, and love. This arc traces his growing personal attachment, culminating in impulsive actions that jeopardize team objectives.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Abe is emotionally reserved and focused on surveillance during the Troll Market mission.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Abe prioritizes the Princess's safety over mission discipline, directly contributing to a tactical escalation and Hellboy's injury.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The Princess's true allegiance and the consequences of Abe's emotional bias remain uncertain, threatening team cohesion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loyalty in Conflict: Between Institution and Brotherhood
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe grapples with conflicting loyalties—to the BPRD, to his teammates, and to his own ethics—ultimately choosing personal allegiance over institutional duty, culminating in his resignation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Abe attempts to mediate institutional pressure and defend Hellboy while maintaining BPRD protocols.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Abe formally resigns from the BPRD, rejecting command structure to stand with Hellboy and Liz as a rogue agent.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term viability of his new path and the moral cost of abandoning institutional support remain unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Emergence of the Sensory Expert
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe establishes himself as the team's indispensable analytical and sensory specialist, repeatedly using his unique abilities to uncover hidden truths and guide mission-critical decisions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Abe uses his heightened senses to detect supernatural threats in the auction room.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Abe deciphers hidden glyphs on a map, revealing the location of Renvyle and redirecting the entire mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite his critical contributions, his expertise is often taken for granted, and he remains emotionally isolated from full peer recognition.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identity and Acceptance in the Public Eye
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe navigates public exposure and societal othering during a media event, transforming a moment of ridicule into dignified self-assertion, marking a step toward public integration despite ongoing prejudice.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Abe is introduced on live television as a non-human agent, facing comedic scrutiny.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He calmly explains his biology, asserting his dignity and advancing public normalization of non-human agents.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Public acceptance remains fragile, with laughter and hostility indicating that societal bias persists despite institutional endorsement.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Fracture and Secret Allegiance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Abe's internal moral conflict intensifies as he withholds critical information, breaks down under pressure, and ultimately chooses a path of secrecy and emotional loyalty over transparency and team unity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Abe discovers the gold piece and chooses to hide it from Liz, betraying team trust.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He concedes piloting duties to Johann, symbolizing a loss of control and confidence amid mounting personal and operational strain.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His true motives for concealing the gold remain hidden, casting doubt on his reliability and future role within the team.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Isolation to Found Family
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy evolves from emotionally strained isolation and rivalry into a deep commitment to his found family, culminating in his acceptance of fatherhood and departure from institutional control to stand with Liz and Abe.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hellboy suppresses personal tension with Liz while recommitting to duty, indicating emotional disconnection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hellboy joyfully embraces the news of Liz's pregnancy, symbolizing a full transition into a life defined by love and familial bonds.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The tension between his self-image as a monster and his desire to be a good partner and father remains unspoken and emotionally unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Burden of Destiny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy transitions from viewing his mission as a series of supernatural threats to confronting his own mythic identity as the harbinger of apocalypse, creating an internal conflict between duty and self-determination.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hellboy treats the artifact recovery as routine, unaware of its world-ending implications.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He learns he is Anung-un-Rama, the prophesied destroyer of the world, and must reconcile his actions with a fate he never chose.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The moral weight of his potential to destroy the world—and whether he can defy prophecy—remains an open existential threat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Public Exposure and Identity Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy's forced public revelation triggers a crisis of identity, shifting him from a covert operative to a scrutinized public figure, ultimately leading to a violent breakdown under societal pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hellboy detonates grenades in public, accepting exposure as an inevitable consequence of his actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He lashes out on live television, symbolizing his loss of control and rejection of the role society demands of him.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term consequences of public exposure and the conflict between his personal identity and public expectation remain unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sacrifice and Survival
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hellboy repeatedly risks his life for others, transitioning from tactical self-sacrifice to near-death and eventual recovery, marking a physical and spiritual journey through destruction and rebirth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hellboy detonates grenades to destroy the tooth fairies, launching himself into danger to ensure the team's escape.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He survives the extraction of the magical spear and regains consciousness, now aware of his mythic significance and renewed purpose.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His physical vulnerability persists, and the threat of future injuries or destiny-driven destruction looms over his survival.
